fields.Name: Hivebrite
fields.Description: Hivebrite community management platform connector — syncs users, companies, events, memberships, donations, groups, and 40+ other objects via Hivebrite Admin API (v1/v2/v3) with OAuth2 password grant authentication.

universalPK.note: All Hivebrite resource schemas use integer `id` as primary key. Explicit in User schema (id: integer, "Unique ID"), Companies_Company, EventEntity, Education, Experience, etc.

Configuration.AuthNotes: OAuth2 resource owner password credentials grant (RFC 6749 §4.3). Initial token: POST /oauth/token with grant_type=password + admin_email + password + client_id + client_secret + scope=admin. Refresh: grant_type=refresh_token + refresh_token + client_id + client_secret. Doorkeeper/WineBouncer implementation. Token endpoint path is /admin/oauth/token (per securityScheme.tokenUrl) but API docs path key is /oauth/token.
Configuration.TokenRefreshNote: Refresh token grant is explicitly documented in /oauth/token endpoint: grant_type=refresh_token with refresh_token + client_id + client_secret returns a new access token.
Configuration.APIVersioningNote: Three concurrent API version namespaces: /api/admin/v1/ (60 paths, oldest), /api/admin/v2/ (79 paths, largest), /api/admin/v3/ (34 paths, newest). v1 topics CRUD is deprecated in favor of v2 topics/groups. Connectors should prefer the highest available version per resource family.

PaginationDefaults.note: Explicit in OpenAPI spec info.description: "The maximum value for our APIs per_page param is 100 and the recommended value is 25." `page` is 1-indexed.

Configuration.IncrementalSyncNote: Most list endpoints support updated_since (ISO 8601 timestamp) for watermark-based incremental sync. 24 of 174 paths carry incremental query params. Primary watermark param: updated_since. Some resources use created_since (Receipts, CurrentLocations) or deleted_since (Versions/deleted). Some resources (News, Posts, BusinessOpportunities, EventWaitlist) do not have documented watermark params.
Configuration.WebhooksNote: No webhook endpoints are documented in the OpenAPI spec (174 paths). Incremental sync is polling-based via updated_since. Gap G7 from SOURCE_STUDY.
Configuration.BulkOperationsNote: POST /admin/v1/users/_bulk (create) and PUT /admin/v1/users/_bulk (update) are documented. Similarly for user-scoped experiences and educations bulk endpoints. No bulk delete or bulk read documented.

WriteCapability.Note: Most resources support full CRUD. Read-only resources: EmailAnalytics, AuditLogs, Roles, EventWaitlist, PaymentAccounts, Notifications, UserDataFields, CurrentLocations, EngagementScoring. Receipts: update only (no create/delete). PostalAddresses: update only.

Configuration.ConcurrencyControlNote: No ETag, version, If-Match, or If-Unmodified-Since headers documented in any of the 174 OpenAPI paths. PUT operations replace the full resource state with no optimistic locking.
Configuration.DeleteSemanticsNote: DELETE /admin/v1/users/{id} returns 204 No Content with no tombstone or archive flag. No deleted_at, archived, or soft-delete flag visible in User schema. The /admin/v1/versions/deleted endpoint provides a separate audit log of deleted items (deleted_since param) — this is a read-only audit resource, not a tombstone mechanism.
Configuration.DefaultSyncDirectionNote: Pull (read-only) default. Bidirectional requires sandbox validation. Hard-delete semantics (no tombstone) make delete propagation risky without careful EntityMap DeleteBehavior configuration.
Configuration.DefaultConflictResolutionNote: ConcurrencyControl=none means no ETag/version to enable MostRecent. DestWins (last-write-wins to destination) is the safe default for bidirectional without optimistic locking.

ErrorResponseShape.note: Error model schema from OpenAPI components.schemas.Error. Some endpoints may return additional fields; shape is not fully enumerated in spec.

Configuration.rateLimitNote: Default: 300 req/min. Secondary limit: 15 HTTP 500+ errors/min triggers throttle until next minute. No Retry-After header documented.
Configuration.CustomFieldMarkerPattern: CustomizableAttribute objects carry a customizable_type field indicating the entity they extend (User, Experience, Event, Education, Donation). Custom fields appear as an array in the parent resource response under the custom_attributes key (User schema: custom_attributes: array of objects with name/value).

OutOfScopeObjectFamilies.reason: Seven v1 CRUD operations at /admin/v1/topics are explicitly marked DEPRECATED in the spec. Superseded by /admin/v2/topics (Groups API). Extraction targets v2 only.
Follower schema (6 props) appears in components.schemas but has no list endpoint in the 174 documented paths. No GET collection endpoint for followers is documented. Gap G5 from SOURCE_STUDY.
MobileDevice schema exists but only a push notification send action is documented (/admin/v1/push_notifications POST). No list/sync endpoint for device registrations. Gap G6 from SOURCE_STUDY.

Admin_V2_EngagementScoring_RankEntity, ScoreEntity are nested sub-objects in ranking responses with no independent list endpoint. Rankings list endpoint returns composite records. Gap G3 from SOURCE_STUDY.
